questions.text: What happens if Customer Care forgets to add CC/WBS to an order?
options: The order is processed without issue
An alarm will pop up at the end of the month
The order will be automatically corrected
The order will be canceled immediately

questions.text: In NEO, B2B channel sales orders can combine products from multiple divisions on a single order
What type of cost is recharged under the "Services directly linked to sell-in" category?
options: Transport cost, postage & packaging billed in addition to the product invoicing

questions.text: What should be done if a sales order is created without a PO Type?
options: The order will proceed as usual
The order will fall into incompletion

questions.text: To identify the correct WBS or cost center users should contact
